article.title: SDE 2 Chances- Uber
article.content:
I completed 4 rounds of interview last month,
For DSA and LLD round the feedback HR mentioned was positive, 
Then I had HLD and HM round, HLD did not go very well but able to answer most of the requirements and HM round also went good. but  
I have been asking HR for the feedback and final result for now atleast more than a month, and everytime they just say they will let me know this week and keep postponing.
Has something like this happen to anyone, and what can be my chances.

post.content: You are just a backup for them. If they dont find a better candidate than you, will offer you or you will b rejected after that. Move on

I was told by recruiter that I dont have LLD round. Both coding rounds are similar in style. However, all the interview experience have LLD round in them. \nI am confused. Please if any one has any suggestions. Please help.
Hey, can you please share the problems as well. It will be helpful..\nThanks in advance
Can you please share what were the questions asked?
Move on. You will be offered if someone does not join.
